src/main/java/com/fractalshot/xmlsplit/S.general_idea: Wrap ZipEntry input stream in InputStreamReader with UTF-8 charset and InputSource to fix character encoding issues.
src/main/java/com/fractalshot/xmlsplit/S.why_exists: Without explicit UTF-8 decoding via InputSource, SAXParser may use platform default encoding, causing runtime SAXException or garbled text for non-ASCII XML content.
src/main/java/com/fractalshot/xmlsplit/S.after: try (InputStream is = zf.getInputStream(ze); ... InputStreamReader isr = new InputStreamReader(bis, StandardCharsets.UTF_8)) { SAXParserFactory.newInstance().newSAXParser().parse(new InputSource(isr), this); }

src/main/java/com/fractalshot/xmlsplit/S.general_idea: Wrap FileInputStream in InputStreamReader with UTF-8 charset and InputSource to fix character encoding issues.
src/main/java/com/fractalshot/xmlsplit/S.why_exists: Without explicit UTF-8 decoding via InputSource, SAXParser may use platform default encoding, causing runtime SAXException or garbled text for non-ASCII XML content.
src/main/java/com/fractalshot/xmlsplit/S.after: try (FileInputStream fis = new FileInputStream(filename); ... InputStreamReader isr = new InputStreamReader(bis, StandardCharsets.UTF_8)) { SAXParserFactory.newInstance().newSAXParser().parse(new InputSource(isr), this); }

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler configuration to target Java 21 instead of Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Code using Java 21 features (e.g., pattern matching for switch, record patterns, virtual threads) will fail to compile if the compiler target remains at 17.
